name: FindDuplicate
description: This node splits the incoming DataFrame into two output DataFrames one having unique values and other having rest of duplicates
input: It accepts a DataFrame as input from the previous Node

fields.name: inputCols
fields.title: Select Columns
fields.description: Select the columns you want to check for unique values.

fields.name: sortByColNames
fields.title: Columns
fields.description: Select one or more columns to sort by. Drag to reorder - the top column is the primary sort key, followed by secondary, tertiary, etc.

fields.name: ascDesc
fields.title: Sorting Order
fields.description: Individually set ASC (ascending) or DESC (descending) for each selected column. Example: Salary To DESC, then Department To ASC, then Name To ASC
